title: Cohere to acquire German AI company Aleph Alpha as it looks to expand in Europe
summary_full: Schwarz Group — a key backer of Aleph Alpha — plans to invest $600 million in Cohere's upcoming Series E round as part of the deal.
summary_public: Schwarz Group — a key backer of Aleph Alpha — plans to invest $600 million in Cohere's upcoming Series E round as part of the deal.

DE.label: positive
DE.evidence: Cohere to acquire German AI company Aleph Alpha as it looks to expand in Europe
